content.en:
Misty Pupil Realm.

Ye Tian entered here, surrounded by a fog, and as soon as he entered, he felt unimaginable pressure.

Bang!!!

The surrounding mist seemed to have infinite pressure, and every trace of mist seemed to have the power to crush the eons, making Ye Tiandu's face change without help but change, and even the half-step perfect will was suppressed extremely under the influence of this power.

"Ordinary half-step perfect controllers will die if they come in!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't perceive the controller of the Youhe, after all, the misty pupil realm is not small, under such suppression, even if it is a copy talent, the range of perception will not be very large, and naturally he can't perceive the location of the master of the river.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian felt the presence of the winds, these winds were very special, and even the power of the mist here could blow.

The wind may not have harmed Ye Tian, but the thick mist that blew brought Ye Tian an even stronger suppressive power.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian felt as if his body was about to crack, but he quickly persevered.

And, over time, the repression here is slowly intensifying.

"No wonder no half-step perfect controller dares to come in, this is just the beginning, I am a little unbearable, but I can imagine that when I get to the back, maybe there will be an accident, and there is no hope of escaping!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's body was also improving under the suppression of the power of the mist, and his body of control and his will were strengthening in a special way.

In fact, this is a trace of the origin power of the mist power in the process of competing with Ye Tian, Ye Tian absorbed a trace of it, maybe a very small part, but after a long time, the amount of absorption will be larger, so the amplitude of enhancement will be more.

After a period of time, the pressure was already very high, but Ye Tian could still bear it.

However, sometimes if you are unlucky, you will still get hurt when you encounter a thick fog that blows.

Of course, he has immunity from the Perfection Rank Ancestral Endowment, which can deflect a portion of the damage.

It was precisely because of the Exemption Perfection Grade Ancestral Endowment that he dared to enter here.

Otherwise, his confidence will be lowered.

"Keep opening the exemption from the Perfection Level Ancestral Endowment, and go to a place where the fog is thicker, maybe the speed of cultivation will be better. "

Ye Tian decided.

However, he will not fully activate the exemption talent, but will keep the pressure on him from the Mist Pupil Realm at a limit, so that the effect of refining is better, otherwise if he is completely exempted, the effect of refining will not work.

Immediately.

Ye Tian moved in the Misty Pupil Realm, looking for a place where the mist was thick.

Time passed, and not long after, Ye Tian found a place where the fog was very thick, and the suppression here was even greater, which could definitely keep him in the limit state at all times, but he had to always turn on the exemption of the Perfect Grade Ancestral Fu.

At this moment, an even thicker mist surged, making Ye Tian's face change.

Immediately, he went all out to activate the exemption from the Perfection Grade Ancestral Endowment, and performed a top-notch Perfect Control Technique—the Time and Space Transfer Method!

This top-notch Perfection Mastery Skill was created entirely based on the Exempt Perfection-level Ancestral Endowment, and its power was many times stronger than the Exempt Perfection-level Ancestral Endowment, but the only trouble was that the Top-of-the-Line Perfection Mastery Technique consumed a lot of money, and it didn't last long.

"Such a thick fog hasn't even dispersed, it's still blowing!"

Ye Tian frowned.

According to this trend, he is afraid that he will get hurt!

Suddenly.

Ye Tian thought of a perfect-level ancestral endowment - atomization!

This is a perfect-level ancestral endowment from the Misty Serpent, I don't know if there is any special effect here.

Immediately.

Ye Tian cast this atomization perfection level ancestral endowment, and his body was in a state of atomization.

In a flash.

Ye Tian found that the special changes that had occurred in him, in the outside world, the Atomization Perfection Grade Ancestral Fu only neutralized the enemy's attacks, but he never expected that there would be a special effect in the Misty Pupil Realm.

At this moment, Ye Tian sensed the boundless distance, and the perception was boundless and clear, and the body after the atomization was still absorbing the power of the fog, and he was frantically refining himself.

"I didn't expect this to be the correct operation of the atomization perfection level ancestral endowment!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"This is definitely not the pupil world of the Misty Snake, maybe the Misty Snake comes from here, if the Misty Snake has been here for an infinite number of years, just by relying on the Atomization Perfection Grade Ancestral Fu, it can grow to an extremely terrifying level!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Hey, if I had known that the Atomization Perfection Grade Ancestral Fu was so awesome, I should have used it earlier!" Ye Tian said with annoyance.

Immediately, he turned on the Atomization Perfection Grade Ancestral Fu with all his might, absorbing the energy of the mist to refine his perfect control body.

Eternal years passed.

After about a hundred eternal years, Ye Tian's half-step perfect control body finally broke the shackles again and became a Dacheng-level half-step perfect control body.

Before, Ye Tian's half-step perfect control body had reached the peak of Xiaocheng, and he thought that it would take an incomparably long time to reach the half-step perfect control body of Dacheng.

But now, he has easily reached the Dacheng level.

If he continued to stay here, he would even have the hope of reaching the Perfection Realm with a half-step perfection-level mastery body.

Those peak half-step perfection-level masters, half-step perfectly controlled bodies are only in the realm of perfection, unless the life level has been tempered by substances such as the Extreme Creation Gold Liquid, they can break through again, transcend the perfection, and reach the half-step perfect control body of the Extreme Creation Realm, and once they break through to the realm of the perfect controller in the future, they can condense the super-perfect ancestral body.

"When the atomization perfection-level ancestral endowment is turned on, the control body has increased the most, and it has been improved a little, but my half-step perfection-level will is also very close to the Dacheng level!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he continued to practice diligently, even going to places where the fog was even more intense.

Anyway, in the fog state, this is like his home, so he is naturally not afraid of these fogs, and the pressure is also very light.

The other side.

The body of the master of the Youhe River continued to collapse and heal, and he brought countless treasures to restore the body of control, just to improve his strength and strive to surpass Ye Tian.

However, his strength has obviously improved a lot, and the speed of improvement is very fast, but his will clone has always been on the blood battle list, and as a result, he has always been in the second place on the blood battle list, and he can't surpass Ye Tian at all.

"How can this be, how can he surpass me in the speed of his ascension?"

The Rulers of the River had some difficulty accepting this fact.

Subsequently.

He inquired, and only then did he know that Ye Tian had also entered the Misty Pupil Realm.

"This guy is already the number one, but he still dares to venture into the Misty Pupil Realm?" the Hidden River Controller was shocked.

Suddenly.

A fog of extreme thickness blew in.

In a flash.

Half of the body of the river controller was directly shattered, and many life-saving things were almost unable to protect him.

"Gotta get out!"

The master of the river used all the last life-saving things to tear through time and space, and forcibly rushed out of the misty pupil realm.

But if you leave, it will take a certain amount of time, and if you don't have time, you will die.

Finally, when the Ruler of the River was about to fall, he finally forcibly broke out of the Misty Pupil Realm and returned to the outside world, but only a little remnant remained, and his injuries were very serious, and I am afraid that it would take a lot of time to fully recover.
